title: Switch Google Sign-In to Web OAuth client
description: Replace the previously incorrect installed/desktop OAuth client ID with the newly created Web application OAuth client ID for Flutter serverClientId and backend token audience verification.
close_reason: Replaced the incorrect installed/desktop OAuth client ID with the Web application OAuth client ID in Flutter, docs, and local backend env.

title: Configure local Google OAuth client ID
description: Wire the Google Web OAuth client ID into local frontend/backend configuration so Google Sign-In can run locally with Android OAuth package/SHA already configured in Google Console.
close_reason: Configured Google Web OAuth client ID for local backend env, Flutter default client ID, and social-login quickstart/docs.

title: Configure Android OAuth client for Google Sign-In
description: Google Sign-In on Android requires an Android OAuth client registered with package com.vfit.vfit_frontend and the SHA-1/SHA-256 of the debug or release keystore used to run the app. If ApiException: 10 remains after the repo-side client fix, update Google Cloud/Firebase OAuth configuration and rebuild.

title: Fix Google sign-in configuration error
description: Google Sign-In currently fails with PlatformException(sign_in_failed, com.google.android.gms.common.api.ApiException: 10). Investigate Android/Firebase OAuth configuration and app code, then apply the repo-appropriate fix.
close_reason: Repo-side GoogleSignIn client configuration fixed: Android no longer passes web clientId as clientId, keeps web client ID as serverClientId, and surfaces ApiException 10 as actionable configuration guidance.

title: Implement Google and Facebook login
description: Implement social login for Android and web: backend provider verification, canonical user linking, V-FIT JWT issuance, and Flutter login buttons below the existing login form.
close_reason: Implemented Google/Facebook social login for Android and web with backend token verification, canonical account linking, V-FIT JWT issuance, Flutter login buttons, Android Facebook SDK config, and verification tests.
